title: Korbond Scissors 8 INCH (20cm) Soft Grip Handle, Ideal for Household, Multi-Purpose, Fabric, Crafting, Sewing, Quilting, Paper, Kitchen. AMBIDEXTROUS – for Right-& Left-Handed Users, 8inch
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK's no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting and clothes care accessories and tools
Korbond multi-purpose household scissors feature precision ground blades to ensure accurate cutting every time. Guaranteed to cut right to the tip of the blade

The soft grip handle and overall lightweight makes these shears comfortable to use for extended periods of time, and the specially designed curves make them suitable for both left and right-handed users

Ideal for fabric cutting, art projects, crafts, sewing, quilting as well as for general household use, in the kitchen wrapping presents and gifts. See the full Korbond scissor range to find further models and specialised crafting scissors
Our products are individually tailored to uphold our performance and quality standards, delivering a consistently reliable product that exceeds our customer's expectations
description: From the manufacturer AMBIDEXTROUS Ambidextrous handles offer comfortable grip, suitable for both left and right-handed cutting. The cushioned handle is moulded to the shape of the hand, making sure the lightweight scissors sit comfortably in your hand when used for long periods of time. MULTI-USE Korbond Household Scissors are ideal for sewers and crafters but also useful for everyday tasks around the home. Ideal for fabric cutting, art projects, crafts, sewing, quilting as well as for general household use, in the kitchen wrapping presents and gifts.
